positive: A minimalist, symmetrical design featuring a stylized pair of celestial foxes (kitsune) leaping through a stylized nebula. The foxes should have elegant, flowing silhouettes, rendered in gold foil texture against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Incorporate abstract, glowing geometric constellations and swirling nebula patterns that cradle the figures. The overall aesthetic should be highly detailed, clean line art mixed with ethereal gradients, suitable for direct apparel printing. Strong central composition, high contrast, dreamlike luminescence, magical realism, woodcut print style details, UHD, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grain, noise, dirty, jpeg artifacts, ugly, cartoon, graffiti, distressed, signature, logos, trademarks, celebrity, copyrighted
